strategy_rationale: released_artifacts.checkpoints contains 'GPT-2 LoRA checkpoint' with supports_main_claim=true. This checkpoint provides trained LoRA adapter weights for GPT-2 Medium on E2E NLG Challenge, which directly supports the main claim (BLEU 70.4 on E2E). Per Phase 0 Strategy A: load released checkpoint, run eval, compare metrics. No training needed.

commands: pip install loralib torch transformers spacy nltk progress

step_1_apply_patches.description: Apply CPU-compatibility patches to gpu.py and gpt2_beam.py
step_1_apply_patches.alternative: Manual edits described in patches_needed section

step_2_beam_search.description: Run beam search decoding with released LoRA checkpoint on E2E test set
step_2_beam_search.command: cd examples/NLG && python src/gpt2_beam.py --cpu --data ./data/e2e/test.jsonl --batch_size 1 --seq_len 512 --eval_len 64 --model_card gpt2.md --init_checkpoint ./checkpoints/gpt2_md_lora_e2e.pt --lora_dim 4 --lora_alpha 32 --beam 10 --length_penalty 0.8 --no_repeat_ngram_size 4 --repetition_penalty 1.0 --eos_token_id 628 --work_dir ./output/e2e_eval --output_file predict.b10p08r4.jsonl
step_2_beam_search.estimated_time_cpu: 20-40 minutes (GPT-2 Medium 354M params, beam=10, ~4600 test examples)

step_3_decode.description: Decode beam search output to text

step_4_evaluate.description: Compute BLEU, NIST, METEOR, ROUGE-L, CIDEr on E2E test set

eval_args.--cpu: flag to run on CPU without distributed

expected_output_patterns.description: Beam search completion marker from gpt2_beam.py
E2E evaluation metrics in measure_scores.py output

patches_needed.description: Add --cpu flag and CPU-only code path that skips distributed init, sets device=cpu, world_size=1
patches_needed.reason: All platform options in parse_gpu() assume CUDA availability and call dist.init_process_group with nccl backend

patches_needed.description: Replace lm_net.cuda() with conditional; skip DistributedSampler and distributed_gather/sync when on CPU; use standard DataLoader without sampler
patches_needed.reason: Line 386 hardcodes .cuda(), line 359 requires DistributedSampler, lines 320-323 call distributed_gather/sync unconditionally

warnings: E2E eval script (eval/e2e/measure_scores.py) must be downloaded via eval/download_evalscript.sh before step 4
The pretrained GPT-2 Medium base checkpoint (~1.4GB) must be downloaded before the LoRA adapter can be loaded, since the adapter weights are applied on top of the base model
Beam search with beam=10 on CPU for ~4600 test examples will take 20-40 minutes; reduce --beam to 5 for faster but slightly different results
The checkpoint file gpt2_md_lora_e2e.pt contains only LoRA adapter weights; the load_weight() method in model.py handles merging with the base model
